form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 3rd of 11 at Morphettville Bm64 on February 21 over 1050m, long-neck behind Invertational with 56.5kg at $8. Last start ran on from midfield; 2nd of 11 at this track Cl1 on March 18 over 1100m, on a slow track; nose behind Silver Lifestyle with 59.5kg at $2.60. Has failed to show enough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened shortly after jumping away by Uncle Barry.
Jumped away awkwardly and slow into stride.
On jumping away, tightened for room between Da Plane Da Plane and Cool Charlie.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At debut, 3rd of 12 at Balaklava 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 4 over 1050m, on a slow track; head behind One Whim with 58kg at $17. Second-up favourite; came from midfield and won by a long-neck at this track 2yo+ Mdn-Sw March 18 over 1050m on a rain affected track defeating Woodstock with 58kg at $3.50. Has been racing well. Progressing well and is expected to measure up again.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months 2nd of 11 at Morphettville 0-62 on March 9 over 1050m, 0.7 len behind Miss Slipstream with 55kg at $5. Previously second-up ran last of 10 at Murray Bridge E&G Bm64 on October 11 over 1100m, 7 len behind Streetcar Fury with 54kg at $26. Winning chance with that run under the belt.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation fourth of 8 at Strathalbyn 0-56 (App Only) November 16 over 1350m, 5.5 len behind Grinzinger Ace with 58kg at $6.50. When resuming last campaign second of 11 at Gawler 3yo+ Cg&E Mdn-Sw August 27 over 1100m, on heavy track; 2.25 len behind Round Two with 58kg at $4.80. Expecting a strong run fresh.
